texto: It is not your fate that is your verdict, but how you deal with your fate. If you find yourself in a story contrary to every vow you have made or wish to make, then you must silence your mind and observe everything closely. You must see the patterns of possible fates in the world around you and choose that which your holy soul tells you to choose." - Thordis, Thunder priestess
explicacao: Orientação direta de Maria Kvilhaug sobre temas ligados a reflexao. A afirmação “It is not your fate that is your verdict, but how you deal with your fate. If you find yourself i…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, fate, choose, útil em momentos de reflexao-noturna e reflexao.
